final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing book cover / social-media cover image for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) amateur-creator media account, formatted as a 9-grid vertical cover layout in an authentic "素人 (ordinary-person)" UGC style, featuring the DJI Pocket 4 camera as the hero product.

Style/medium: authentic Xiaohongshu 素人 (amateur influencer) aesthetic — candid, warm, slightly over-exposed snapshot feel, soft grain, hand-crafted layout energy; NOT polished commercial photography
Composition: 9-grid vertical cover (3×3 tiled mosaic implied in a single portrait frame), central title text block anchored at visual center, DJI Pocket 4 product visible and prominent in the central or upper-center cell, generous white/light margins between grid cells
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera as hero product, held naturally by a casual hand or resting on a pastel surface; surrounding cells show lifestyle detail shots (coffee, notebook, soft bokeh background) to reinforce 素人 vibe
Scene/backdrop: bright airy indoor setting — white desk or café table, soft natural window light, minimal clutter
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, slightly warm color temperature, cheerful and approachable mood
Color palette: warm cream and white as base, muted pastel accents (peach, sage, dusty pink) as grid cell tints, title text in a contrasting playful color (coral or sky blue)
Text (verbatim): "大疆pocket4初体验"
Constraints: title text "大疆pocket4初体验" must be centered, large, and rendered in a cute, differentiated display typeface (rounded bubbly or hand-lettered style, NOT system sans-serif); 9-grid visual structure must be clearly readable at thumbnail size; overall layout must feel like a real Xiaohongshu 素人 cover, not a brand advertisement
Avoid: corporate glossy product-shoot lighting; dark dramatic backgrounds; generic stock-photo aesthetic; stiff symmetrical composition; overuse of gradients; watermarks; any text other than the specified title
